confirm_date.text: หุ้น ณ วันที่

member_group_no.nulltext: ดึงทั้งหมดไม่ต้องเลือกจ้า

root.sql: select sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date , sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no , sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_fullname , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance as share_stock , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_desc from sc_cls_confirm_data , sc_cls_confirm_mem , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type where sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code = sc_cls_confirm_mem.mem_type and sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_status_code = '0' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance > '0' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'SHR' /*WHERE*/ --and sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no = '05955' --and sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date = '09/06/2024' order by sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no
